CustomField.formula: OR ( Product_Line__c = "APS", Product_Line__c = "ARS", Product_Line__c = "AWS", Product_Line__c = "CLH", Product_Line__c = "CLR", Product_Line__c = "DIS", Product_Line__c = "FAP", Product_Line__c = "HCS", Product_Line__c = "HTS", Product_Line__c = "IAS", Product_Line__c = "INV", Product_Line__c = "LVI", Product_Line__c = "MFT", Product_Line__c = "MLD", Product_Line__c = "MOL", Product_Line__c = "MOX", Product_Line__c = "NMO", Product_Line__c = "NVS", Product_Line__c = "PBR", Product_Line__c = "PGI", Product_Line__c = "QTS", Product_Line__c = "RRD", Product_Line__c = "RRS", Product_Line__c = "SPS", Product_Line__c = "TBR", Product_Line__c = "TIS", Product_Line__c = "TSC", Product_Line__c = "EZR", Product_Line__c = "AA", Product_Line__c = "ICP", Product_Line__c = "MAS", Product_Line__c = "GC", Product_Line__c = "LC", Product_Line__c = "LCM", Product_Line__c = "IR", Product_Line__c = "UVS", Product_Line__c = "TEA", Product_Line__c = "MMS", Product_Line__c = "MBA", Product_Line__c = "RAM", Product_Line__c = "PER", Product_Line__c = "AMP", Product_Line__c = "DAB", Product_Line__c = "DAO", Product_Line__c = "DLP", Product_Line__c = "EXT", Product_Line__c = "FNP", Product_Line__c = "GMP", Product_Line__c = "IMF", Product_Line__c = "IMG", Product_Line__c = "LMP", Product_Line__c = "RVA", Product_Line__c = "SKC", Product_Line__c = "TXV", Product_Line__c = "AM", Product_Line__c = "LM", Product_Family__c="72-PER",Product_Line__c = "DL",Product_Line__c ="FN",Product_Line__c ="FTF",Product_Line__c ="GM",Product_Line__c ="PIV",Product_Line__c ="DCS",Product_Line__c ="DLS",Product_Line__c ="DSS",Product_Line__c ="DEL",Product_Family__c=="75-QPS",Product_Line__c="QPS",Product_Line__c="HCA",Product_Line__c ="NEO",Product_Line__c ="PRE",Product_Line__c ="NPT",Product_Line__c ="DIA",Product_Line__c ="CHS",Product_Line__c ="VIR",Product_Line__c ="CCM",Product_Line__c ="MSD",Product_Line__c ="MDX",Product_Line__c ="NAP",Product_Line__c ="RHS",Product_Line__c ="NEX",Product_Line__c ="SDX",Product_Line__c ="BIO",Product_Line__c ="EIM",Product_Line__c ="SSS",Product_Line__c ="ADS",Product_Line__c ="LCA",Product_Line__c ="MZG",Product_Line__c ="PCK",Product_Line__c ="HMG" ,Product_Line__c ="HHS",Product_Line__c ="IDX",Product_Line__c ="NXM")
CustomField.label: Is DAS Products?
